notes: Everything works out of the box except story mode cutscenes which can be fixed by running z0z0z's mf-install script (https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install) on the game's prefix (AppID 1110100). Full controller support and online multiplayer functionality.
title: Power Rangers: Battle for the Grid

notes: My DS4 controller was only recognized if I use Steam Big Picture mode. Story mode cutscenes work after media foundation workaround (https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install/blob/master/install-mf.sh)
title: Power Rangers: Battle for the Grid
